SEARCH
Package com.icarus.events

Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.icarus.events.Event
public class Event extends Object
Represents an event in the application.

Stores event information retrieved from Firebase Firestore, including identifying details, registration dates, location, and organizer.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Event(String id, String name, String category, Double capacity, Date regOpen, Date regClose, Date startDate, Date endDate, String location, String image, ArrayList<String> organizers)
    Creates a new Event object.
    Event(String id, String name, String category, Double capacity, Date regOpen, Date regClose, Date startDate, Date endDate, String location, String image, ArrayList<String> organizers, String user_status, int waiting_list_size)
    Creates a new Event object with user-specific waitlist information.

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event(String id, String name, String category, Double capacity, Date regOpen, Date regClose, Date startDate, Date endDate, String location, String image, ArrayList<String> organizers)
      Creates a new Event object.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the event
      name - the name of the event
      category - the category of the event (e.g., Sports, Music, Education)
      capacity - the maximum number of entrants allowed
      regOpen - the date when registration opens
      regClose - the date when registration closes
      startDate - the date the event starts
      endDate - the date the event ends
      location - the location where the event is held
      image - the image associated with the event
      organizers - the identifier of the event organizer

    • Event

      public Event(String id, String name, String category, Double capacity, Date regOpen, Date regClose, Date startDate, Date endDate, String location, String image, ArrayList<String> organizers, String user_status, int waiting_list_size)
      Creates a new Event object with user-specific waitlist information.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the event
      name - the name of the event
      category - the category of the event (e.g., Sports, Music, Education)
      capacity - the maximum number of entrants allowed
      regOpen - the date when registration opens
      regClose - the date when registration closes
      startDate - the date the event starts
      endDate - the date the event ends
      location - the location where the event is held
      image - the image associated with the event
      organizers - the identifiers of the event organizers
      user_status - the current user's status for this event (e.g., waitlist, selected, registered, or rejected)
      waiting_list_size - the current number of entrants on the waitlist
